raw_response: Given your budget and quality preferences, the Sony over-ear wireless headphones are a great choice for office work. They offer good noise cancellation and an impressive 50-hour battery life, making them convenient for long days at the desk. Though they have heavy bass tuning that might not suit everyone, their LDAC codec support ensures high-quality audio when you switch to clearer sound settings. The foldable design also makes them easy to store in your office drawer or bag.

parsed.recommendation_text: Given your budget and quality preferences, the Sony over-ear wireless headphones are a great choice for office work. They offer good noise cancellation and an impressive 50-hour battery life, making them convenient for long days at the desk. Though they have heavy bass tuning that might not suit everyone, their LDAC codec support ensures high-quality audio when you switch to clearer sound settings. The foldable design also makes them easy to store in your office drawer or bag.
